name: osac-dev
description: OSAC development workflows: bug fix, bug reporting, and platform operations with Jira integration

agents.name: fix-bug
agents.description: End-to-end bug fix agent — opens a Jira bug, writes the fix with tests, verifies build/format/tests pass, commits, posts a PR, and moves the ticket to Code Review.

commands.name: fix-bug
commands.description: End-to-end bug fix workflow with Jira and PR

commands.name: report-bug
commands.description: Report a bug in Jira without fixing it

skills.name: fix-bug
skills.description: End-to-end bug fix workflow — opens a Jira bug, writes the fix with tests, verifies build/format/tests pass, commits, posts a PR, and moves the ticket to Code Review. Use when the user says 'fix this bug', 'open a bug and fix it', or describes a bug they want tracked and resolved in Jira with a PR.

skills.name: report-bug
skills.description: Report a bug in Jira without fixing it — creates a Bug ticket with proper description, links it to an epic, and assigns it. Use when the user says 'report a bug', 'file a bug', 'log a bug', 'open a bug ticket', or wants to track a bug without immediately writing a fix.

skills.name: operate
skills.description: Deploy, debug, and operate the OSAC platform — covers building images, deploying via kustomize, debugging stuck resources, checking logs, fixing finalizer issues, signaling resources, AAP job troubleshooting, and end-to-end cleanup. Use when the user says 'deploy', 'debug', 'why is X stuck', 'check logs', 'clean up', 'restart controller', 'signal resource', 'check AAP job', 'build images', or asks about OSAC operational issues.

jira.description: jira-cli (ankitpokhrel/jira-cli) — interactive Jira command line tool

gh.description: GitHub CLI for creating pull requests

jq.description: JSON processor for parsing raw output

kubectl.description: Kubernetes CLI for cluster operations (required for operate skill)

grpcurl.description: gRPC CLI for API operations and signaling (required for operate skill)
